zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Willes是Ann Pryor的女兒，於1735年9月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州。她於1723年與Thomas Hughes在美國維吉尼亞州盧度斯特林結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於1795年在美國田納西州格林享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sarah Willes是Ann Pryor的女儿，于1735年9月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州。她于1723年与Thomas Hughes在美国弗吉尼亚州盧度斯特林结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世于1795年在美国田纳西州格林享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Willes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wills
meanings: English and German: variant of Will with genitival -s.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.description: "Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Willes was born on 4 September 1735, in Virginia, British Colonial America as the daughter of Ann Pryor. She married Thomas Hughes in 1723, in Sterling, Loudoun, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died in 1795, in Greene, Tennessee, United States, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Willes est née le 4 septembre 1735, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, fille de Ann Pryor. Elle a épousé Thomas Hughes en 1723, à Sterling, Loudoun, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée en 1795, à Greene, Tennessee, États-Unis, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.Charles City Virginia: Charles City County, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Sarah Willes wurde am 4. September 1735 in Virginia, British Colonial America, als Tochter von Ann Pryor geboren. Sie hat 1723 in Sterling, Loudoun, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Thomas Hughes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb 1795 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Greene, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Willesは1735年9月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州でAnn Pryorの娘として生まれた。1723年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ロウドウンステルリングでThomas Hughesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女は1795年にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州グレエンで60歳で死去した。

ko.Fredrick City, Shenandoah, Virginia, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 던모어
ko.Charles City Virginia: 미국 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Willes(은)는 1735년 9월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 Ann Pryor의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1723년 미국 버지니아 주 루다운 스털링에서 Thomas Hughes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1795년 미국 테네시 주 그린에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Charles City Virginia: чарльс сити коунти, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Willes родилась 4 сентября 1735 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. Её мать звали Ann Pryor. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Hughes в 1723 г. в местности стирлинг, лоудоун, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла в 1795 г. в местности грин, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 60 лет.
